summary: Iteration 40 - Image Upload Testing. All backend upload APIs working correctly with Authorization headers. Fixed missing file input for Login Page logo upload in SuperAdmin.js. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend upload functionality verified for System Logo, Invoice Logo, Login Page Logo, and Background uploads.
passed_tests: Backend: Uploaded files accessible via URL - PASSED
Frontend: Visual Identity modal opens - PASSED
Frontend: System Identity tab - logo upload from device - PASSED
Frontend: Invoice Settings tab - logo upload from device - PASSED
Frontend: Login Page tab - logo upload from device - PASSED (after fix)
Frontend: Add Background modal - upload from device - PASSED
Frontend: Demo client Settings - Products section accessible - PASSED

fixed_issues.issue: Login Page logo upload button (رفع شعار) was not functional - missing file input and onClick handler
fixed_issues.fix: Added hidden file input with id='login-logo-upload', onClick handler to trigger file selection, and confirm upload button

critical_code_review_comments: All upload APIs properly require Authorization header
Frontend upload functions in SuperAdmin.js correctly include token from localStorage
ImageUploader component properly handles file compression and upload
Files are saved to correct directories: /app/backend/uploads/logos/, /app/backend/uploads/backgrounds/
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/SuperAdmin.js - Fixed Login Page logo upload button (lines 3323-3365)
seed_data_creation: Test images uploaded during testing (blue 200x200 PNG files)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 tested all image upload functionality. All upload APIs working correctly with Authorization headers. Fixed Login Page logo upload button which was missing file input. Files are saved to /app/backend/uploads/ directories. ImageUploader component in frontend handles compression and upload for products/categories.
